durable_improvement: Integrated the cross-artifact deployment consistency validator into the Cloudflare Pages workflow before final evidence manifest creation.
observed: The consistency regression suite is now part of the workflow contract-test stage.
The consistency artifact is generated after acceptance and before evidence finalization.
A failed consistency result exits nonzero and blocks successful workflow completion.
The generated consistency artifact is uploaded with the deployment proof packet.
inferred: A future authenticated deployment run can no longer successfully finalize a proof packet whose deployment decision contradicts its acceptance record.
proposed: Dispatch the workflow after Cloudflare environment credentials are configured, then verify the returned URL, served research-surface identity, control-plane metadata, consistency artifact, and deployed source commit.
superseded: The validator existing only as committed source and isolated tests was sufficient workflow enforcement.
unresolved: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN availability was not observed.
No workflow execution, resolving URL, served identity, or deployed commit was observed in this run.
next_action: Obtain an authenticated workflow execution and inspect its uploaded cloudflare-deployment-consistency.json plus final evidence manifest; retain C-001 as externally blocked until resolving URL, served surface, and deployed commit are all observed.
